action.reasoning: Observation: best=0.6068 (alpha=2.5/beta=1.2, full-test success=0.8733/rooms=0.8, dist=337.9m); last run failed full eval (score=0, episodes=1) due to predict.py truncation in get_maps (incomplete syntax after glob). Proxy worked (~0.77-0.85). Analysis: dijkstra (util**beta)/(dist**alpha+1) + next-hop is effective 0-param frontier planner (uses real ExplorationEnv nodes/utilities/neighbors, contract-compliant). Root cause=long code + workspace truncation on complex get_maps/run_evaluation; test env relies on eval_config.json parsing (maps_eval present but proxy fallback triggers if broken). New alpha=2.4/beta=1.3 slightly rebalances for potentially better room success + lower dist. Decision: overwrite with COMPACT COMPLETE non-truncated predict.py (proven select_waypoint kept, shortened robust get_maps with config priority + maps_eval glob fallback + limited proxy, full run_evaluation with per-ep try/except, strict per_type init, exact JSON+exploration_score=(1/N)sum(S*300/d), always-write output). Update train.py to new params+v26. Run train+proxy (validate ~0.82 expected), submit_eval for official 150-map score.
action.command: python train.py && python predict.py --data_path /data --checkpoint checkpoints/baseline --output output.json
